queries.question: List all science labs and also list art studios that have computers.
queries.sql:
SELECT Learning_Spaces.Name 
FROM Learning_Spaces
WHERE Learning_Spaces.Type = "Science Lab" OR Learning_Spaces.Type = "Art Studio" AND Learning_Spaces.AvailableResources = "Computers"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?learning_spaces a :Learning_Spaces .
  ?learning_spaces p:name ?name .
  ?learning_spaces p:Type ?type_w .
  ?learning_spaces p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?learning_spaces p:AvailableResources ?availableresources_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Science Lab" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Art Studio" && STR(?availableresources_w) = "Computers")))
}

queries.question: Give me the science labs and art studios that have computers.
queries.sql:
SELECT Learning_Spaces.Name 
FROM Learning_Spaces
WHERE (Learning_Spaces.Type = "Science Lab" OR Learning_Spaces.Type = "Art Studio") AND Learning_Spaces.AvailableResources = "Computers"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?learning_spaces a :Learning_Spaces .
  ?learning_spaces p:name ?name .
  ?learning_spaces p:Type ?type_w .
  ?learning_spaces p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?learning_spaces p:AvailableResources ?availableresources_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Science Lab" || STR(?type_w2) = "Art Studio")) && STR(?availableresources_w) = "Computers"))
}
